name: GravNewton
short_description: Challenge all your skill and quick thinking ability in this precision platform game, where you are a bitrom who controller over gravity called Newton, who is trying to escape from a deformed creature that relentlessly follows him in subspace.
detailed_description:
Challenge all your skill and quick thinking ability in this precision platform game, where you are a bitrom who controller over gravity called Newton, who is trying to escape from a deformed creature that relentlessly follows him in subspace.

Features:

  • Differentiated gameplay;
  • 12 sectors with unique Challenges;
  • 72 stages (6 per sector);
  • Traps like saws, lasers, bombs and more;
  • Ranks based on your performance in sectors.
